recommendations.title: The Time Traveler's Wife
recommendations.overview: Due to a genetic disorder, handsome librarian Henry DeTamble involuntarily zips through time, appearing at various moments in the life of his true love, the beautiful artist Clare Abshire.

recommendations.title: The Captain
recommendations.overview: Germany, 1945. Soldier Willi Herold, a deserter of the German army, stumbles into a uniform of Nazi captain abandoned during the last and desperate weeks of the Third Reich. Newly emboldened by the allure of a suit that he has stolen only to stay war

recommendations.title: Allegiant
recommendations.overview: Beatrice Prior and Tobias Eaton venture into the world outside of the fence and are taken into protective custody by a mysterious agency known as the Bureau of Genetic Welfare.

recommendations.title: Insurgent
recommendations.overview: Beatrice Prior must confront her inner demons and continue her fight against a powerful alliance which threatens to tear her society apart.

recommendations.title: R.I.P.D.
recommendations.overview: A recently slain cop joins a team of undead police officers working for the Rest in Peace Department and tries to find the man who murdered him.

recommendations.title: RED
recommendations.overview: After surviving an assault from a squad of hit men, retired CIA black ops agent Frank Moses reassembles his old team for an all-out war. Frank reunites with old Joe, crazy Marvin and wily Victoria to uncover a massive conspiracy that threatens their

recommendations.title: China Moon
recommendations.overview: Detective Kyle Bodine falls for Rachel Munro who is trapped in a violent marriage. After she shoots her husband, Kyle relucantly agrees to help hide the body, but his partner is showing an unusual flair for finding clues.

recommendations.title: Snake Eyes: G.I. Joe Origins

recommendations.title: The Five Devils

recommendations.title: Changeling
